title: Upgrading, Merger, or Consolidation of Licensed Manning Agencies.
content: 59 The upgrading, merger, or consolidation of licensed manning agencies shall be 60 undertaken in accordance with the regulations of the SEC, without prejudice to the 61 17 determination by the Department of the qualifications of the new partners or directors. 1 The upgraded licensed manning agencies, the surviving corporation, or the new 2 corporation, as the case may be, shall inform the Department of such changes within 3 thirty (30) calendar days from confirmation by the SEC of such upgrading, merger or 4 consolidation. 5 6

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
